title: DBMS Architecture Overview
description: A simplified visual representation of the core components of a Database Management System (DBMS) and their interactions.
relationships: End Users/Applications send queries and transactions to the DBMS Software
DBMS Software interprets requests, accesses, and manipulates data in the Database
DBMS Software returns results to the End Users/Applications
DBA manages and maintains the Database and DBMS Software
All components run on and utilize the System Hardware
